candidates.non_goal_boundary: Do not install automatic compaction triggers or background context monitors in Task 69.
candidates.rationale: The checkpoint helper exists; the enhancement question is policy and review cadence, not a new runtime service.
candidates.required_action: Review whether existing compaction checkpoint evidence needs stricter trigger guidance before adding automation.
candidates.title: Compaction trigger policy review

candidates.non_goal_boundary: Do not create live metric dashboards or notification systems.
candidates.rationale: Stakeholder and success metrics packets now exist and can support enhancement prioritization.
refresh_commands: python3 scripts/codex-task success metrics --report-file reports/success-metrics/latest.json --runbook-file reports/success-metrics/latest.md
python3 scripts/codex-task stakeholder report --report-file reports/stakeholder-reporting/latest.json --runbook-file reports/stakeholder-reporting/latest.md
candidates.required_action: Regenerate reusable metrics before selecting a Phase 5 implementation candidate.
candidates.title: Enhancement metrics and stakeholder refresh

candidates.non_goal_boundary: Do not replace registry or exact-text search with live semantic calls.
candidates.rationale: Search foundations are implemented; future enhancement should verify routing and evidence, not add a parallel discovery stack.
candidates.required_action: Keep deterministic registry/rg lookup first and use Serena as capability-aware semantic support.
candidates.title: Serena and semantic discovery verification

candidates.non_goal_boundary: Do not implement speculative performance changes without baseline evidence.
candidates.rationale: Caching and discovery optimizations already exist; future work should be evidence-triggered.
candidates.required_action: Use performance reports to decide whether a specific measured optimization task is warranted.
candidates.title: Registry and performance optimization follow-up

candidates.non_goal_boundary: Do not import scanner roadmap items into Taskmaster automatically.
candidates.rationale: Scanner roadmap generation exists, but source data freshness should be confirmed before driving enhancement planning.
candidates.required_action: Refresh scanner data before using roadmap counts as Phase 5 priority evidence.
candidates.title: Scanner roadmap backlog refresh

candidates.non_goal_boundary: Do not call external AI models or create generated templates in Task 69.
candidates.rationale: Metadata and registry policy exist, but generation requires explicit safety gates and its own implementation scope.
candidates.required_action: Create a dedicated task for generation guardrails before invoking any model or writing templates.
candidates.title: AI-assisted template generation guardrail plan

candidates.non_goal_boundary: Do not enable context7, firecrawl, elevenlabs, fpl, or other optional MCPs in Task 69.
candidates.rationale: Core Serena/Taskmaster MCPs are established; optional MCPs need concrete use cases and current startup verification.
refresh_commands: Review optional MCP startup logs before enabling any new server
candidates.required_action: Create separate MCP-specific tasks for any optional server, with startup verification and rollback notes.
candidates.title: Optional MCP integration evaluation

label: task69-phase5-enhancement-planning
non_goals: No automatic compaction trigger, scheduler, daemon, background monitor, or context watcher is installed.
No semantic-search service, vector database, indexer daemon, or replacement for registry/rg discovery is created.
No AI-assisted template generation calls an external model, creates new templates, or mutates template sources.
No optional MCP server is installed, enabled, or configured by this command.
No performance optimization is applied without measured bottleneck evidence.
No Taskmaster tasks, sessions, plans, work tracking, Git state, report sources, templates, or external systems are mutated beyond requested enhancement planning artifacts.
planning_guidance: Treat ready candidates as evidence-backed next-task options, not automatic implementation authority.
Treat planned candidates as backlog concepts that require their own Taskmaster task and scope reconciliation before code changes.
Refresh source reports before sharing the plan externally or promoting a candidate to implementation.
Prefer static packet, guard, and helper improvements over live services until a measured repository gap proves the need.

recommended_next_actions.required_action: Review whether existing compaction checkpoint evidence needs stricter trigger guidance before adding automation.
recommended_next_actions.title: Compaction trigger policy review

recommended_next_actions.required_action: Regenerate reusable metrics before selecting a Phase 5 implementation candidate.
recommended_next_actions.title: Enhancement metrics and stakeholder refresh

recommended_next_actions.title: Serena and semantic discovery verification

recommended_next_actions.title: Registry and performance optimization follow-up

recommended_next_actions.title: Scanner roadmap backlog refresh

python3 scripts/codex-task stakeholder report --report-file reports/stakeholder-reporting/latest.json --runbook-file reports/stakeholder-reporting/latest.md
